records.description: Anduril Industries is a U.S.-based defense technology company founded in 2017 that focuses on modernizing military capabilities through autonomous systems and advanced software. The company develops Ai-powered surveillance, reconnaissance, and defense platforms, including unmanned aerial systems, counter-drone technologies, and integrated battlefield awareness solutions. Its core product, Lattice OS, fuses sensor data into real-time situational awareness and supports autonomous decision-making. Anduril works primarily with U.S. and allied defense agencies and emphasizes rapid development cycles compared to traditional defense contractors.

records.description: Zipline is an autonomous logistics company founded in 2014 that specializes in drone-based delivery systems for medical supplies and commercial goods. The company operates fixed-wing drones capable of long-range, high-speed delivery, particularly in regions with limited infrastructure. It first gained traction delivering blood and vaccines in Rwanda and Ghana and has since expanded globally. Zipline’s system combines automated distribution centers, precision navigation, and parachute drop delivery, enabling efficient last-mile logistics without requiring landing infrastructure.
records.seoTitle: Zipline Jobs (2026) | Careers, Hiring & Drone Roles
records.careersBlurb: Zipline hires for roles in drone logistics, flight operations, and autonomous systems engineering. Browse current job openings and discover similar opportunities in UAV delivery and robotics.
